---

## Component
- [ ] UI / Frontend (React/Next.js)
- [ ] BFF / API Routes (Next.js App Router)
- [ ] Acumatica Service Integration
- [ ] Authentication / Session

## Bug Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error (check Browser Console or Server Logs)

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Environment Details
- **Browser:** [e.g. Chrome, Safari]
- **Environment:** [e.g. Local Development, Production]
- **Acumatica Version:** [if known]

## Screenshots (if applicable)
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., specific Inventory ID or Branch).
